hypothesis: Under the optimized electrolyte and flow conditions (1.5 M KHCO3/0.75 M K2CO3, 3 M K+, 54 °C, 144 mL min−1 bicarbonate, 2.4 M KOH at 24 mL min−1), replacing steady 250 mA cm−2 galvanostatic operation with a 1 Hz square-wave current toggling between 150 and 350 mA cm−2 at 50% duty will increase reactor yield by at least 20%.
